entity.label: Rehoboth
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: An ancient city on the Euphrates (Gen. 36:37; 1 Chr. 1:48), “Rehoboth by the river.”

nodes.label: Rehoboth
nodes.description: An ancient city on the Euphrates (Gen. 36:37; 1 Chr. 1:48), “Rehoboth by the river.”

verses.text: And Samlah died, and Saul of Rehoboth by the river reigned in his stead.
And when Samlah was dead, Shaul of Rehoboth by the river reigned in his stead.
